event: right extra anatomical axillobifemoral bypass graft
laboratory evidence of end-stage renal disease
chest X-ray demonstrated air under the right hemi-diaphragm
started on parenteral antibiotics in ER
extension into the right sub-phrenic region
gas in the right collecting system
no gas in the renal parenchyma
computed tomography showed the right atrial thrombus
very high risk for surgical intervention
requested to do the minimal life-saving procedure
multiple cystic lesions with air “bubbles” all over the bladder
ureteric Double J stent inserted in the right ureter
patient reasonably well during the procedure
culture of the collection showed Klebsiella pneumonia extended-spectrum β-lactamase
